_comment: Full GPU zero-copy pipeline in one worker. capture (main + sub):
store(mode=continuous, stream 0) records the main stream compressed;
decode_detect(stream 1) is the FUSED stage: NVDEC decode + on-GPU motion +
on-GPU detect (shared batched engine) in one synchronous call, so the surface
never leaves VRAM or crosses a queue. tracker + alert_policy dedup to one alert
per object. Swap "hw" to target another backend (cuda today). roi_motion=true
gates inference on motion and detects per region. Copy to pipelines/<name>.json
with real URLs/paths (git-ignored). Run from build/: ./zm-core --pipeline ...
